case_title: JOSHUA CHAVEZ et al VS. JOHN LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, JOSHUA APFELZWEIG, ALEXANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JOHN DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-28-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-13-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-28-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-16-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVEZ, JOSHUA APFELZWEIG, ALEXANDRA SERVED JAN-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, JOHN
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-09-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-05-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-16-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
